title: how to get an openid enabled account

what is openid? openid is an internet-wide identity system that allows you to sign in to many websites with a single account. instead of having lots of different usernames and passwords for lots of different sites, openid acts as your single point to verify that you're you, so you can join or login to the website you're visiting.
openid: an actually distributed identity system
